settings.heading: Local Guides & Charters
settings.body_text: Looking for a guide who knows the water? Here are some of the best in the Lowcountry — recommended by the team at Pawleys Island Outdoors.

settings.label: Recommended
settings.heading: Guides We Trust
settings.body_text:
We get asked all the time — who should I fish with? These are the captains and guides we send our own friends and family to. They know the Lowcountry waters inside and out.

Want to be listed here? Stop by the shop or give us a call.

settings.heading: Captain [Name]
settings.body_text: Inshore fishing charters — redfish, flounder, trout. Departing from Pawleys Island.

settings.heading: Captain [Name]
settings.body_text: Offshore and nearshore charters — king mackerel, cobia, sharks. Georgetown area.

settings.heading: [Name] Guide Service
settings.body_text: Duck and deer hunting guides. Lowcountry waterfowl and whitetail specialists.

settings.label: Need Gear?
settings.heading: We'll Get You Set Up Before Your Trip
settings.body_text: Stop by Pawleys Island Outdoors before you head out. We'll make sure you have everything you need.
